title: jurinea calcarea
intro: Jurinea calcarea, also known as calcareous jurinea, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Jurinea calcarea include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Jurinea calcarea is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts have been studied for their potential use in phytomedicine and as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
